objective.restatement: Every active regime must have calibrated confidence >=95 percent and must retain suitable confidence on other markets and other cycles/timeframes before the goal can be called complete.
success_criteria: scoped active regime lanes have calibrated confidence >=0.95
other-market/species validation uses source-owned or owner-approved labels
other-cycle/timeframe validation reaches suitable confidence without proxy labels
direct Manipulation species coverage uses real positives, matched controls, and provenance
no raw provider rows or large cache files are committed
update_goal is called only if all strict criteria are covered

checklist.requirement: active regimes have calibrated confidence >=95 percent
checklist.evidence: v14 completion audit and regime-factor consumer map
checklist.gap: strict full objective requires broader source/timeframe/species validation
accepted factor/gate total remains 0 and full other-market source-label equivalence is false
future protocol improved strict 1h to 45/156, but native sub-hour remains 0/4 and full strict 1h remains incomplete

checklist.requirement: direct Manipulation species coverage has matched controls and provenance
checklist.gap: 6 direct varieties remain unaccepted and ready missing-species sources are 0

checklist.requirement: local/external intake files satisfy required schemas before promotion
checklist.gap: exact schema matches are 0 and strong partial matches are 0

checklist.requirement: proxy labels and unapproved crosswalks are not promoted
checklist.evidence: source-label and direct-source screens remain fail-closed
checklist.gap: guardrail compliance leaves the strict objective blocked until acceptable rows arrive

checklist.requirement: no raw data or runtime-code pollution by this audit
checklist.evidence: this audit records only small JSON/MD/CSV/check/script files
checklist.gap: the wider worktree remains dirty from concurrent agents and was not normalized

checklist.requirement: call update_goal only after strict completion

unmet_requirements: full other-cycle/timeframe confidence beyond 45/156 strict 1h future protocol rows and 0/4 native sub-hour
direct Manipulation full species coverage with matched controls
external/local intake rows with exact required schemas
source-owned recency/source-label expansion for remaining strict rows
